name: XMax Inc.
summary: PART I Our Company Nova LifeStyle, Inc. (Nova LifeStyle or the Company) is a U.S.-headquartered innovative designer and marketer of contemporary styled residential and commercial furniture formerly known as Stevens Resources, Inc. We were incorporated in the State of Nevada on September 9, 2009. The Companys products are marketed through wholesale and retail channels as well as various online platforms worldwide.
